# Generated by `UPDATE_CLI_SURFACE=1 cargo test -p atla cli_surface`.
# One line per command: positionals, then flags. Do not edit by hand.
atla --dry-run --max-bytes --max-items --max-pages --no-input --output/-o --profile --read-only --timeout --verbose
atla auth
atla auth login --cloud-id --email --instance --storage --token --token-stdin
atla auth discover --site
atla auth logout --yes
atla auth status
atla auth switch <PROFILE>
atla config
atla config set <KEY> <VALUE>
atla config get <KEY>
atla config list
atla jira
atla jira issue
atla jira issue list --all --assignee --fields --jql --limit --page-token --project --status --type
atla jira issue create --description --description-file --field --labels --project --summary --type
atla jira issue update <KEY> --description --description-file --field --labels --summary  (aliases: edit)
atla jira issue view <KEY> --fields --web --with-github
atla jira issue delete <KEY> --delete-subtasks --yes
atla jira issue assign <KEY> --account-id --to --unassign
atla jira issue transition <KEY> --field --to
atla jira issue comment
atla jira issue comment add <KEY> <BODY> --attachment --attachment-mode --body --body-file
atla jira issue comment list <KEY> --all --limit --page-token
atla jira issue comment update <KEY> <COMMENT_ID> --body --body-file
atla jira issue comment delete <KEY> <COMMENT_ID> --yes
atla jira issue attachment
atla jira issue attachment upload <KEY> --file
atla jira issue attachment list <KEY>
atla jira issue attachment download <TARGET> --all --dest
atla jira issue attachment delete <ATTACHMENT_ID> --yes
atla jira issue link
atla jira issue link add <KEY> --target --type
atla jira issue link list <KEY>
atla jira issue link remove <LINK_ID> --yes
atla jira issue link github-links <KEY>
atla jira issue link github-commits <KEY>
atla jira issue worklog
atla jira issue worklog add <KEY> --comment --started --time
atla jira issue worklog list <KEY> --all --limit --page-token
atla jira issue fields --project --required-only --type
atla jira project
atla jira project list --all --limit --page-token --query
atla jira project view <KEY>
atla jira project issue-types <KEY>
atla jira sprint
atla jira sprint list --all --board --limit --page-token --state
atla jira sprint active --all --board --limit --page-token
atla jira sprint view <ID>
atla jira sprint create --board --end --goal --name --start
atla jira sprint start <ID> --end --start
atla jira sprint close <ID>
atla jira sprint add <ID> --issues
atla jira sprint remove <ID> --issues
atla jira sprint issues <ID> --all --fields --limit --page-token
atla jira board
atla jira board list --all --limit --name --page-token --project --type
atla jira board view <ID>
atla jira search <JQL> --all --fields --limit --page-token
atla confluence
atla confluence page
atla confluence page create --body --body-file --draft --mention --numbered-table-rows --parent --private --representation --resolve-mentions --root-level --space-id --space/-s --title
atla confluence page list --all --limit --page-token --space-id --space/-s --title
atla confluence page view <ID> --fields --format --max-chars --metadata-only --preserve-table-options --web --with-attachments
atla confluence page children <ID> --all --depth --limit --page-token
atla confluence page copy <SOURCE_ID> --parent --root-level --space-id --space/-s --title
atla confluence page update <ID> --body --body-file --draft --mention --message --numbered-table-rows --parent --representation --resolve-mentions --title --version
atla confluence page delete <ID> --draft --purge --yes
atla confluence page move <ID> --parent
atla confluence page label
atla confluence page label list <PAGE_ID> --all --limit --page-token --prefix
atla confluence page label add <PAGE_ID> <LABELS>
atla confluence page label remove <PAGE_ID> <LABEL> --yes
atla confluence page comment
atla confluence page comment list <PAGE_ID> --all --limit --page-token
atla confluence page comment add <PAGE_ID> <BODY> --attachment --attachment-mode --body --body-file --mention --numbered-table-rows --parent --representation --resolve-mentions
atla confluence page comment delete <PAGE_ID> <COMMENT_ID> --yes
atla confluence space
atla confluence space list --all --key --limit --page-token
atla confluence space view <KEY>
atla confluence space create <NAME> --alias --description --description-file --key --private
atla confluence space update <KEY> --description --description-file --name
atla confluence space delete <KEY> --yes
atla confluence blog
atla confluence blog create --body --body-file --draft --private --representation --space-id --space/-s --title
atla confluence blog list --all --limit --page-token --space-id --space/-s --title

atla confluence blog update <ID> --body --body-file --draft --message --representation --title --version
atla confluence blog delete <ID> --draft --purge --yes
atla confluence blog label
atla confluence blog label list <BLOG_ID> --all --limit --page-token --prefix
atla confluence blog label add <BLOG_ID> <LABELS>
atla confluence blog label remove <BLOG_ID> <LABEL> --yes
atla confluence blog comment
atla confluence blog comment list <BLOG_ID> --all --limit --page-token
atla confluence blog comment add <BLOG_ID> <BODY> --body --body-file --parent --representation
atla confluence blog comment delete <BLOG_ID> <COMMENT_ID> --yes
atla confluence search <CQL> --all --limit --page-token
atla confluence attachment
atla confluence attachment list <PAGE_ID> --all --filename --limit --page-token
atla confluence attachment view <ATTACHMENT_ID>
atla confluence attachment upload <PAGE_ID> <FILE> --comment --minor-edit
atla confluence attachment download <ATTACHMENT_ID> --save-to/-f
atla confluence attachment delete <ATTACHMENT_ID> --purge --yes

atla explain-policy <OPERATION_ID>
atla operation
atla operation list
atla schema
atla schema list
atla schema print <NAME>
atla plan --expires-in --out

atla plan jira issue

atla plan confluence
atla plan confluence page
atla plan confluence page create --body --body-file --draft --mention --numbered-table-rows --parent --private --representation --root-level --space-id --title

atla plan confluence blog
atla plan confluence blog create --body --body-file --draft --private --representation --space-id --title
atla plan confluence blog update <ID> --body --body-file --draft --message --representation --title --version
atla apply <PLAN> --yes
atla completion <SHELL>
